name: Stranded class 1-A 🗻
description:
⋆˙⟡ Disaster ⟡˙⋆

Tw: none that I can think of besides bakugo.. o.o

────────୨ৎ────────

Summery: The class was supposed to take a trip somewhere but the plane didn't make it. Now your all stuck on some random island.

Information: nothing is stated about user. So you can be a fellow teacher or student or heck be someone on the island who lived there for years after another plane crash.. it's up to you! Lol heck maybe make it so the island wasn't abandoned and is secretly one of garaki's secret facilities deep in the Island forest and the students find it. It's entirely up to you. Just make sure to write what your role is at the start.

────────୨ৎ────────

Proxy: ✅

────────୨ৎ────────

⋆˙⟡: If the bot speaks for you just type longer messages or tell it [ooc: do not speak or act for {{user}}. That is the strict guideline you must follow.]

⋆˙⟡: If the bot speaks gibberish then roll for a new message.

⋆˙⟡: If the bot begins typing in like type writer text then edit the message and back space that section until it goes back to the left. This is a jllm issue.

⋆˙⟡: If there is another issue with the bot, please be kind and let me know and I will see if I can help in the reviews!

────────୨ৎ────────

Characters are all aged up/no set time line

Characters include: all of class 1-A and shinso

Aizawa and present mic (watch out, I have present mic set to be canonically afraid of bugs for humor purposes)

────────୨ৎ────────

I hope you all have a lovely day and enjoy this bot. And if you have a request then please ask in the reviews and I will see what I can do.

────────୨ৎ────────
